levels.title: Signal lock
levels.story: A carrier wave brushes the network—something wants to be found. You are not grinding; you are calibrating.

levels.title: First echo
levels.story: Each tap sends a ping through the trophy lattice. The debugger hums in sympathy.

levels.title: Star fix
levels.story: Cartographers left breadcrumbs in Star Map 25. Follow the arc—not the noise.

levels.title: Rhythm proof
levels.story: Momentum is evidence. The system rewards patience encoded as repetition.

levels.title: Quest ink
levels.story: Quest lines are contracts with your future self. Open the scroll; close the loop.

levels.title: Thermal run
levels.story: Energy bars are mood rings. Learn the cool-down cadence like a musician learns rests.

levels.title: Timeline stitch
levels.story: The timeline is not nostalgia—it is forensic continuity. Visit it once with intent.

levels.title: Combo ethics
levels.story: Combos are concentration made visible. Earn them without burning out.

levels.title: Trophy grammar
levels.story: Trophies are sentences in a language only long players speak fluently.

levels.title: Nexus closure
levels.story: Season one tightens: profile XP, game points, and calm mastery converge. The signal holds.

levels.title: Constellation boot
levels.story: Season two opens: the same ledger, wider orbits. Choose how you hunt—path, vanguard, or weave.

levels.title: Forked proof
levels.story: Your path refracts the gate: explorers read guides, fighters prove battle, weavers grow trust.

levels.title: Deep catalog
levels.story: The compendium whispers when you walk the walkthrough with patience.

levels.title: Social filament
levels.story: Crews are not noise—they are redundancy for joy. Touch the social thread.

levels.title: Battle echo
levels.story: One honest clash in the arena writes truth to your stats.

levels.title: Co-op threshold
levels.story: Three allies change the math of the hunt—milestone for weavers and the generous.

levels.title: Stellar patience
levels.story: Return to the map after battle—perspective, not superstition.

levels.title: Calm journey
levels.story: The epic tab is a breather encoded as content. Rest is progression.

levels.title: Reward lattice
levels.story: Revisit rewards with new eyes—you have earned the right to want.

levels.title: Arc complete
levels.story: Twenty nodes. One profile. The Nexus arc rests—not ends.
